acrobatics.name: Acrobatics
acrobatics.summary: Balance, tumbling, and similar agile movement.

animal-handling.name: Animal Handling
animal-handling.summary: Calming, directing, or intuiting the intentions of animals.

arcana.name: Arcana
arcana.summary: Lore about spells, magic items, eldritch symbols, and magical traditions.

athletics.name: Athletics
athletics.summary: Climbing, jumping, swimming, and feats of physical exertion.

deception.name: Deception
deception.summary: Hiding the truth through lies, misdirection, or false impressions.

history.name: History
history.summary: Lore about historical events, people, kingdoms, wars, and civilizations.

insight.name: Insight
insight.summary: Reading intentions, motives, and emotional cues.

intimidation.name: Intimidation
intimidation.summary: Influencing someone through threats, hostility, or displays of force.

investigation.name: Investigation
investigation.summary: Finding clues and drawing deductions from evidence.

medicine.name: Medicine
medicine.summary: Stabilizing a dying creature or diagnosing illness.

nature.name: Nature
nature.summary: Lore about terrain, plants, animals, weather, and natural cycles.

perception.name: Perception
perception.summary: Spotting, hearing, or otherwise detecting something present.

performance.name: Performance
performance.summary: Entertaining an audience with music, dance, acting, or storytelling.

persuasion.name: Persuasion
persuasion.summary: Influencing others with tact, social grace, or good faith.

religion.name: Religion
religion.summary: Lore about deities, rites, prayers, cults, and holy symbols.

survival.name: Survival
survival.summary: Tracking, navigating, predicting weather, and avoiding natural hazards.
